programme.title: The Contractor

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: A group of friends trek into the Bolivian jungle. They soon realize that the jungle is a difficult place to be

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: An army pilot must travel through time using the 'Source Code' in order to identify a ruthless bomber.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: A police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop.

programme.title: Kill the Irishman
programme.desc: The true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: Homeboy [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Though only in his 20s, professional boxer Johnny Walker is on the downswing of his career and suffering from a mild form of brain damage. Resettling in the beachfront resort of Asbury Park, N.J., he falls in with shady promoter Wesley Pendergrass and meets kindhearted boardwalk operator Ruby. When Wesley proposes cutting Johnny in on a criminal undertaking, Johnny must choose between a life of crime and a settled future with Ruby.

programme.title: Heathers [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Veronica (Winona Ryder) is part of the most popular clique at her high school, but she disapproves of the other girls' cruel behavior. When Veronica and her new boyfriend, J.D. (Christian Slater), confront clique leader Heather Chandler (Kim Walker) and accidentally poison her, they make it appear a suicide. Soon Veronica realizes that J.D. is intentionally killing students he does not like. She races to stop J.D. while also clashing with the clique's new leader, Heather Duke (Shannen Doherty).

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: After several years away, FBI agent Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) returns to find his mother, Marty (Meg Ryan), a much different person: Having long mourned for Henry's father, she is now embracing single life. One day, while Marty, Henry and his new fiancée, Emily (Selma Blair), are out for a walk, they meet Tommy (Antonio Banderas), a mysterious stranger, with whom Marty then becomes involved. However, through his FBI contacts, Henry learns that Tommy is suspected of being an art thief.

programme.title: Direct Contact
programme.desc: An American prisoner in a Russian jail is given a chance at freedom if he can rescue a kidnapped woman.

programme.title: Before I Go To Sleep [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Ever since a vicious attack nearly claimed her life, Christine Lucas (Nicole Kidman) has suffered from anterograde amnesia and is unable to form new memories. Every morning, she becomes reacquainted with her husband, Ben (Colin Firth), and the other constants in her life. In accordance with her doctor's (Mark Strong) instructions, Christine keeps a video diary. As Christine starts to uncover terrifying truths about her past, she begins to question everything -- and everyone -- around her.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers

programme.title: Arlington Road
programme.desc: Man begins to suspect his neighbors are not what they appear to be and their secrets could be deadly

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: A former DEA agent moves his family to a quiet town, where he soon tangles with a local meth druglord.

programme.title: Two For the Money
programme.desc: Brandon Lang loves football: an injury keeps him from the pros.

programme.title: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Craig Sheffer and Brad Pitt star as two brothers who rebel against their stern father and become men in the majesty of the Montana wilderness.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Powerful story about three brothers struggling to stay together and the woman who comes between them.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: Talent brought him to the edge of glory... Fate took him to the well of despair... and love sent him to the place he was meant to be. A middle-aged unknown comes seemingly out of nowhere to become a legendary baseball player with almost supernatural talent.

programme.title: Big Fish
programme.desc: The story revolves around a dying father (played by Finney, and McGregor as a young man) and his son (Crudup). Trying to learn more about his dad by piecing together the stories he has gathered over the years, the son winds up re-creating his father s elusive life in a series of legends and myths inspired by the few facts he knows. Through these tales, the son begins to understand his father s great feats and his great failings.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes To Washington
programme.desc: James Stewart takes on the powers-that-be in our nations capitol in Frank Capras timeless classic. Nominated for eleven 1939 Oscars, including best picture.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: Allied commandos are dispatched deep inside the Burmese jungle to blow up a strategic bridge built by British POWs.

programme.title: The Guns Of Navarone
programme.desc: In this WWII spectacle, British intelligence learns that two enormous guns have been installed on the Aegean island of Navarone. The long-range field pieces are capable of destroying any British fleet trying to sail to Kheros, near Turkey, where a large British force is facing annihilation unless it is evacuated. It s the job of Captain Mallory and a handful of men to land secretly on Navarone and dismantle the guns.

programme.title: The Road To Wellville
programme.desc: Presiding over the renowned Battle Creek Sanitarium is the visionary cornflake inventor and health-craze huckster Dr. John Harvey Kellogg (Hopkins). Seeking to improve their health – and their marriage – are Eleanor (Fonda), Kellogg's spellbound devotee, and Will (Broderick), her reluctant but devoted husband. What doesn't kill them in this spa/hospital/grand hotel will only make them stronger as they make their way through an obstacle course of sexual temptations, mechanical contraptions and dietary breakthroughs. Filled with outrageous methodology and hilarious hijinks, this "sumptuously photographed turn-of-the-century comedy with a fine cast" (San Francisco Chronicle) will make you double over ... with laughter!

programme.title: The Big Sleep
programme.desc: A grizzled American private detective in England investigates a complicated case of blackmail turned murder involving a rich but honest elderly general, his two loose socialite daughters, a pornographer and a gangster.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: Brady Hawkes, The Gambler, receives a letter from his son indicating he needs help. This sends Brady to the rescue.

programme.title: Rough Magic
programme.desc: Set in the 1950s, Rough Magic tells the story of what happens when a pretty apprentice magician goes to Mexico to escape her fiancé, a wealthy politician, and to find a Mayan shaman who will teach her ancient principles of magic. She is being trailed by a detective hired by her fiancé. He's a former photojournalist traumatized by what he saw in Hiroshima. The photojournalist joins her in the search for the Mayan shaman, and falls in love with her; the feeling is not reciprocated. When she finds the shaman, she drinks a potion which empowers her to do magic. The potion has life-changing effects on her and her relationship with her companion. They have strange experiences which are brought about by magic.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger fights for survival against drug traffickers who have stashed heroin in his hunting cabin.

programme.title: The Prince
programme.desc: When his daughter is kidnapped, a retired assassin is drawn back into the life he gave up.

programme.title: Paradise City
programme.desc: A son seeks revenge for the murder of his bounty-hunter father.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: A grieving snowplow driver seeks out revenge against the drug dealers who killed his son.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: A father goes undercover and infiltrates a Mexican drug cartel for the DEA in order to free his son.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Memories of the Sword
programme.desc: A warrior goes on a mission to seek revenge for the death of her parents.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: One year after avenging his brother's murder, MMA champion Kurt Sloane finds himself imprisoned by a powerful gangster in Thailand. To win back his freedom, he must train for a fight against a 400-pound killer in an underground death match.

programme.title: Police Story: Lockdown
programme.desc: While visiting his estranged daughter at a nightclub, a police captain must spring into action when a kidnapping plan unravels right before his eyes.

programme.title: Chasing the Dragon
programme.desc: Illegal immigrant and drug kingpin Crippled Ho arrives in Hong Kong in 1963. He quickly and ruthlessly builds an underworld empire that's ruled by dealers and corrupt police.

programme.title: Chasing the Dragon II: Wild Wild Bunch
programme.desc: The head of a notorious human trafficking gang begins abducting the children of Hong Kong's wealthy elite. Police forces send in an undercover agent to infiltrate the gang and save the hostages.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 1
programme.desc: Prominent Lawyer Alex Murdaugh's family's hidden crimes begin piling up.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 2
programme.desc: Alex Murdaugh called police and reported his wife Maggie and son Paul dead.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: Includes exclusive never-before-seen footage and new interviews with Tammy Lee.

programme.title: Surviving My Father: The Rachel Jeffs Story
programme.desc: Rachel's journey from victim to victor, showing the triumph of the human spirit.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 1
programme.desc: Prominent Lawyer Alex Murdaugh's family's hidden crimes begin piling up.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 2
programme.desc: Alex Murdaugh called police and reported his wife Maggie and son Paul dead.

programme.title: The Reliant
programme.desc: When the economy collapses, widespread rioting and looting leaves a 21 year old lovesick girl struggling to care for her four younger siblings in a stretch of woods on the outskirts of their burning town.

programme.title: Midnight Stallion
programme.desc: JACK and his daughter TERESA train a wild horse in hopes of winning enough money to save their farm.

programme.title: Knockout
programme.desc: A retired pro boxer, now a school janitor, tries to help a new student, who is being targeted by bullies.

programme.title: Forever Love
programme.desc: A couple's lost love goes full circle between the 50's and the present.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Traffickers
programme.desc: Tiffany Cooper, disgraced by the military, wanted by the cops and running out of time, stops at nothing to take down a Trafficking Operation and save these young girls. Nothing is what it seems when everyone seems to be against you. Trust No One.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: Counteract
programme.desc: Amateur and immature social media influencer, Sylvia Shaw has set out to aide her struggling family from financial ruin. Doing so, she is lured into working for a mysterious company that promises fame and great wealth. But soon realizes, her new employer is a mystery, for many reasons.

programme.title: Only 48
programme.desc: When Tracy Harris is abducted and held for ransom, her father Keith has only 48 hours to deliver $500,000. Forced back into the criminal world he tried to escape; Keith faces dangerous alliances and hidden truths in order to save his daughter.

programme.title: Something Old
programme.desc: With her wedding days away, Kara agrees to meet her ex, Malik, for what she swears is just one last goodbye. But Malik isn’t looking for closure—he wants her back, and he’s not taking no for an answer. What starts as a simple meetup at a hotel turns into a dangerous game of obsession and control. As Kara’s fiancé Jordan uncovers the truth with help from her maid of honor, time’s running out.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Karmen, a successful businesswoman is secure and thriving in every part of her life, except for love. She downloads a dating app and seems to have found Mr. Right in Jermaine, but her best friends warn her that he might be a scammer. As Karmen falls deeper, she slowly falls victim to a network of lies and deceit, that could cost her life.

programme.title: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: On her birthday, Summer is publicly humiliated when her fiancé, Chance, and her best friend, Portia, reveal their affair. Seeking revenge, she sabotages their honeymoon with the help of her friend Danisha. A deadly game of cat-and-mouse ensues, with betrayal, violence, and unexpected twists. Ultimately, Summer must confront the consequences of her actions as she fights for her life and seeks justice.

programme.title: The Land That Time Forgot
programme.desc: A modern adaptation of the classic novel about survivors of a shipwreck trapped on an island with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Allan Quatermain and the Temple of Skulls
programme.desc: A retelling of Haggard’s classic novel featuring Allan Quartermain, the inspiration for Indiana Jones.

programme.title: King of the Lost World
programme.desc: In a modern adaptation of Arthur Conan Doyle's classic, a plane crashes into a land of mysterious creatures.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Doc must spirit walk to save the Chief of the Water Keepers and get the water flowing to Newmerica.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: The team responds to the threat of a potentially devastating earthquake in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Atlantic Rim
programme.desc: When giant monsters crawl out of the Atlantic, the U.S. government turns to A.I. robots to defend the country.

programme.title: Mermaid Down
programme.desc: A mermaid is ripped from the Pacific, her tail is chopped off and she's thrown into a mental home where no one believes she is a mermaid.

programme.title: Creeping Death
programme.desc: Halloween was always Tims favorite holidayuntil his mother was diagnosed with brain cancer. Now, all he wants is a quiet night in. That is quickly disrupted when his friends pay him an unwanted visit, after stealing a mysterious sack from the doorstep of a local crazy. This sacrilegious act unleashes the Aos Si, a Celtic spirit that walks the Earth on Halloween. They must band together and survive the night or make the ultimate offeringtheir lives--this Halloween, all who trick are treats.

programme.desc: Streaming exclusively from Bloody Disgusting and Scotchworthy Productions, Bloody Bites is a compilation of snack-sized horror films that will terrorize, astonish, disturb, and excite genre fans across the globe.

programme.title: The Crush (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A really unsettling movie and one that marked Silverstone out as a major talent. Den of GeekA man who should know better. A much younger teenager. No way should there be any kind of romance between them. Yet from the moment 14-year-old Adrian met Nick, she was crazy about him. There must be something she can say or do. Some way she can show him this is not just a crush. What can she do? What won't she do?Romantic obsession has harrowing consequences in The Crush, a suspense thriller starring Cary Elwes (Saw, The Princess Bride), Jennifer Rubin (Bad Dreams, Screamers) and Alicia Silverstone (Clueless, The Babysitter) in her breakthrough role. Elwes plays Nick, at first flattered by Adrian'ss flirtation, then gripped with outright fear. Because what Adrian wants, Adrian gets. If she can't have her Mr. Right, no one can.

programme.title: Mandrake
programme.desc: Mandrake follows probation officer Cathy Madden, who is given the task of rehabilitating notorious killer 'Bloody' Mary Laidlaw back into society after twenty years of jail.

programme.title: V/H/S/99
programme.desc: V/H/S/99 harkens back to the final punk rock analog days of VHS, while taking one giant leap forward into the hellish new millennium. In V/H/S/99, a teenager's home video leads to a series of horrifying revelations. A SHUDDER ORIGINAL

programme.title: Kandisha
programme.desc: Three childhood friends invoke the spirit of a vengeful creature in a game that turns into a living nightmare after their loved ones begin to disappear.

programme.title: Baskin
programme.desc: Five cops stumble upon the blood-spattered bowels of Hell where dark rituals and unspeakable horrors await in this head-spinning freak-out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark arae stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Bandit Of Zhobe
programme.desc: THE BANDIT OF ZHOBE is a western set in India, with the jut-jawed hero (Mature), the sweet young thing (Aubrey), and comic relief (Newley). Mature is an Indian leader whose family as been wiped out by the British. Truth is, it wasn't the British at all but a rival group of Indians wearing British red coats.

programme.title: Blazing The Western Trail
programme.desc: Jeff Waring (The Durango Kid) and his friends Tex Harding and Cannonball become involved in the affairs of two rival stagecoach line, one of them headed by Mary Halliday whose father has been murdered by the gang of the rival line, Forrest Brent. She is unaware of this, and hinders rather than helps the Durango Kid and his friends in their attempts to expose Brent and his gang.

programme.title: North From The Lone Star
programme.desc: Bill Elliott as Wild Bill Hickok takes on the job of sheriff so he can rid a frontier town of villain Richard Fiske and his thugs, Arthur Loft and Jack Roper. Fay and Rochelle compete for Elliott's affections. Comic relief is handled by Taylor.

programme.title: Massacre Canyon
programme.desc: Philip Carey (Lt. Richard Faraday) has to lead a wagon train carrying rifles through hostile Indian territory. Black Eagle (Steven Ritch) is the renegade leader of the Indians.

programme.title: Al Jennings Of Oklahoma
programme.desc: An up-and-coming lawyer abandons his legal career to become a notorious Oklahoma bank robber.

programme.title: Gunmen From Laredo
programme.desc: A jailed rancher escapes to track down the outlaws who framed him for a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: Six Gun Trail
programme.desc: Legendary cowboy star Tim McCoy stars as Captain William Carson, who along with his sidekick Magpie does battle with jewel thieves. Its an actionfilled drama of the West, with plenty of blazing guns and heman adventure! There are a couple of songs, too, including Moon Over the Plains but they arent sung by Tim McCoy. He was too darned tough to sing! Also starring Nora Lane, Ben Corbet; directed by Sam Newfield.

programme.title: The Star Packer
programme.desc: He Dared Death In The Outlaw's Lair! John Travers (John Wayne) takes on a mysterious gang leader known as The Shadow in this vintage western from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Director/writer Robert N. Bradbury (Blue Steel, Riders of Destiny) gets the best of a remarkable cast that includes George Gabby Hayes. Of interest to film buffs is that the feature was shot in various California locations by Oscar winning cinematographer Archie Stout (The Quiet Man).

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: Bob's Playin' A Mystery Hand... He's Marked For Death By Killer Bullets As Gunfire Echoes Over The Plains! After one of his ranch hands is killed when a gang attacks his ranch, Jim Roberts joins forces with his neighbor in an effort to fight off the Bennett Cattle Co., a company looking to rob them of their land. Things get increasingly dangerous as the company hires Butch Crane, a professional killer, to stop them. Directed by Sam Newfield (Racing Luck (1935), Go-Get-Em, Haines (1936)), Raiders of Red Gap stars Robert Livingston (The Three Mesquiteers (1936), Larceny on the Air (1937)) as Rocky (Lone Rider) Cameron and Al St. John (Billy the Kid Trapped (1942), Border Feud (1947)) as Fuzzy Q. Jones.

programme.title: Raiders of Old California
programme.desc: The end of the Mexican-American War finds a brazen U.S. Calvary captain and his men taking over a Spanish land grant. Albert C. Gannaway (The Badge of Marshall Brennan) directs an all-star cast including Jim Davis (Jock Ewing of Dallas), Arleen Whelan (Young Mr. Lincoln) and Lee Van Cleef (The Good, The Bad, and the Ugly). Also, look for appearances by legendary country & western stars Marty Robbins and Faron Young.

programme.title: The Fighting Westerner
programme.desc: A mining engineer tries to solve the murders of several heirs to a valuable radium mine in this western drama from Paramount Pictures. Stars include Charles Chic Sale, and in one of his early roles, Randolph Scott. This feature, also known as Rocky Mountain Mystery, was directed by Oscar winner Charles Barton, who would go on to direct several popular television shows, including Petticoat Junction and Family Affair...

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: A love story and a search for gold in the Valley of Death! Dubbed simple, powerful and dramatic by the New York Times on the date of its release, Death Valley is indeed an elegant depiction of love and deception in the American desert during the Gold Rush. In what was to be the final film of famed silent film director Paul Powell (Polyanna), a cast of mostly unknown actors produces uniformly excellent work. Lyrical and graceful, Powells film spins the tale of a young boy who finds love and gold, only to have it stolen from him.

programme.title: Riders of the Whistling Pines
programme.desc: GENE AUTRY COMES ROARING OUT OF THE SKIES...to save the forests from an outlaw lumber ring! When ex forest ranger Gene tries to interfere with a gang destroying the timberland, hes framed for cattle-poisoning and set up for a murder charge. Yet, he still has time to sing some great cowboy songs, including Its My Lazy Day, and Hair of Gold. This is Gene Autry in a slightly different role, with some great footage filmed at Big Bear Valley and San Bernardino National Forest.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: For a decade, the white settlers and the Apaches have been engaged in a bloody war with no peaceful end in sight. When a white scout, Tom Jeffords (James Stewart), has a dangerously close but enlightening encounter with the natives, he begins to see the humanity in these enemies. Entering the Apache territory seeking peace, Jeffords forms a friendship with the Apache leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), although there are people on both sides who resist extending the olive branch.

programme.title: Doc Holliday
programme.desc: Doc Holliday runs a small dental practice in rural Georgia when he is visited by Wyatt Earp and offered a chance to become a United States Deputy. All Doc has to do is capture the Bridle Brothers - two of most notorious outlaws the West has ever seen. The Doc sets out on an adventure like none other to find these hardened criminals and ends up forging a friendship with Wyatt Earp that would carry into the events of Tombstone.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Good for Nothing
programme.desc: While traveling to her uncle's ranch, an Englishwoman is kidnapped by a savage outlaw. However, a dangerous posse mistakes them for partners in crime, and the duo then goes on the run across the frontier to survive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job. Especially when everyone learns Sam is gay – and proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Akebi's Sailor Uniform
programme.desc: Her first self-introduction to her class. Her first school lunch. To Komichi, who never had any classmates throughout her elementary school years, these were all new and fun things. As she eats lunch around joined desks with Kizaki Erika, Usagihara Touko, and Kojou Tomono, a song by Fukumoto Miki plays during the school's lunchtime broadcast. When Touko learns that Miki is Komichi's role model, she hands Komichi a tube of lip balm and asks her to imitate Miki's music video...

programme.title: Akebi's Sailor Uniform
programme.desc: After Komichi completes the fifty-meter dash with the fastest time in her class, several athletic clubs try to recruit her. but Komichi can't decide which club she wants to join because there are too many things she wants to try. Following a random turn of events, she exhanges contact information with Tanigawa Kei, the brightest girl in the class, who is also having trouble deciding which club to join. Komichi still hasn't reached a decision when Tomono, who has decided to join the literature club, offers to visit all the different clubs with her. At last, Komichi makes up her mind...

programme.title: Akebi's Sailor Uniform
programme.desc: Kei, who joined the photography club, asks Komichi to model for some photos. They get started right away, but Kei says the photos don't match the image she has of Komichi. That's to be expected, considering all Komichi did was copy Fukumoto Miki's poses. So as Komichi begins to wonder just what her "image" is, a certain occurrence results in her and Kei paying a visit to the Mangetsu Dorm, where Touko and many of their other classmates live. Komichi is deeply impressed by the sweets Touko makes, so with Touko's guidance, she tries to make some of her own...

programme.title: Akebi's Sailor Uniform
programme.desc: Ohkuma Minoru knows a lot about animals and insects, and her fascination with living things has led her to keep a research notebook of her daily observations. That fascination has now turned toward her classmate, Komichi. Komichi knows a lot about various creatures due to her country upbringing, and she takes notes on things that interest her. After learning that they have these things in common, Minoru and Komichi decide to observe their classmates together. Minoru believes that acting in secret is important when observing living things, but Komichi, the only student at the school who wears a sailor uniform, tends to stand out and isn't the best at being secretive...

programme.title: Akebi's Sailor Uniform
programme.desc: Komichi makes up her mind to invite Erika over during the weekend. But because she's never invited anyone to her house before and doesn't know how to ask, a week has passed before she realizes it. Erika, realizing that Komichi is acting suspicious, invites her to the school library to try to find out what's going on. Komichi takes an interest in the book on fishing that Erika is reading and tells her that she often goes fishing at the lake near her house with a her own homemade pole. Erika responds with a look of envy, and from there...

programme.title: Akebi's Sailor Uniform
programme.desc: As classes end and students are heading to their clubs, Hebimori Oshizu, who didn't join any clubs, returns to her dorm alone. She's interested in music and bands, but the rock music playing through her headphones and the music magazines featuring her favorite artists are enough for her. But then one mistaken thought by Komichi changes her day-to-day life: "I want to hear a real guitar! Please let me hear you play sometime!"

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his beloved Mini Marsala Meatballs, mixing beef and pork with breadcrumbs soaked in milk and browning them until golden before finishing them in a rich marsala-mushroom sauce. The hosts discuss proper meatball technique, family traditions around Sunday gravy, and the surprising versatility of marsala wine in savory cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his beloved Tuscan White Bean Stew with chicken sausage, onions, and celery while welcoming sports broadcaster Marysol Castro ó the first female and Latina PA announcer for the New York Mets ó as a special guest. Bean Week reaches its emotional peak as the hosts discuss baseball basics, recent life milestones, and the deeply satisfying power of a vegetable-forward winter meal.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall makes a warmly spiced Moroccan Apple Crumble with dates, cardamom, and cinnamon, building a simple crumble topping using a foolproof ratio formula and serving it with a dollop of cr√ãme fra√ìche for an elegant finish. The hosts discuss the art of checking doneness by eye rather than timer, date farming in California, and Carla's personal decision to embrace her natural gray hair.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Bean Week with her Black Bean Empanadas, stuffing golden, flaky pastry shells with a richly seasoned black bean filling that proves legumes can be just as craveable as meat. The hosts celebrate the internet's enthusiastic response to Clinton's Bean Week proposal and dive into the week with maximum enthusiasm.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his deeply satisfying Pasta e Fagioli during Bean Week, building a thick, soul-warming pasta and bean soup that he considers one of the greatest cold-weather dishes ever conceived. The hosts debate the pronunciation of Italian words in Italian-American households and celebrate the cultural heritage behind this Roman classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Valentine's Day week launches with Carla Hall making an Easy Chicken Curry that she considers the perfect romantic dinner: warming, aromatic, and impressive without being stressful. The hosts debate whether cooking for a date should feel effortless or theatrical and share their own most romantic food memories.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his legendary Sexy Time Chicken for Valentine's Day, a dish he swears exudes confidence, intention, and genuine romance with every bite. Guest Devyn Simone joins to share relationship etiquette wisdom, and the hosts explore what makes food truly feel romantic beyond just the recipe itself.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Buttery Sage Stuffing" - Just in time for the holidays, the Recipe Club (Dave Chang, Chris Ying, and guest John deBary) dissects the most butter-filled stuffing recipe of all time, then tries to recreate it three ways: in under 20 minutes (John; ultra luxe (Dave); and keto (Chris).

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Sweet Potato Pie" - Dave and Chris are joined by special guest Malcolm Livingston II to take a deep holiday dive into sweet potato pie. Malcolm shares a remarkable recipe he developed (you will be a holiday hero if you make this!), which Dave tries to make in the microwave in less than 15 minutes, and Chris challenges himself to make handmade agar-agar for his version.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Cream Cheese - Halifax Donair Dip" - Cream cheese goes beyond the bagel in this episode featuring Mahalia Tahririha’s deconstructed take on a classic Halifax sandwich by way of Greece. David Chang makes a version using only shelf-stable ingredients; Priya Krishna makes hers Keto friendly; and Chris Ying luxe-ifies his, taking a relatively inexpensive recipe and spending more than $150.

programme.title: What To Cook Next
programme.desc: Filipino desserts, demystified. Chef Nico De Leon makes tibok-tibok, a creamy carabao-milk pudding, highlighting texture, patience, and the power of simplicity.

programme.title: What To Cook Next
programme.desc: Nico walks through pancit palabok, a layered dish of rice noodles, seafood, and sauce that showcases depth through technique and toppings.

programme.title: What To Cook Next
programme.desc: Crisp, golden, and deeply satisfying. Nico breaks down the art of frying with pork and shrimp lumpia, finished with a house-made sweet chili sauce.

programme.title: What To Cook Next
programme.desc: Filipino breakfast staples, explained. Nico cooks tortang talong, longsilog, and garlic rice — comfort food that anchors the day with savory, soulful flavors.

programme.title: What To Cook Next
programme.desc: Nico prepares kinilaw with scallop (or oyster) and a bright mango-tomato salad, showing how acid, freshness, and restraint define Filipino raw dishes.

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: Courtney McBroom, former culinary director of Milk Bar, culinary consultant on Apple TV’s Lessons in Chemistry, and founder of Ruined Table (amongst many other things!) stopped by the kitchen to make her Recipe Club-winning dish: Texas-Style Smoked Brisket Nachos! They are easy, delicious, and will make everyone at your party very happy.

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: From Scott Clark of Dad's Luncheonette (and former chef de cuisine of the three-Michelin-star Saison in San Francisco), a homemade Oreo that we can actually get behind. Generally we stand opposed to trying to recreate perfect foods like ketchup or Oreos. We thought this was gonna be a moon pie masquerading as an Oreo. But no, this rules. Crispy, crunchy, addictively satisfying.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Bernie’s has turned a simple frozen dessert into a new LA classic: the granita with toasted meringue. Chef Jon Berne layers bright, icy fruit with a cloud of brûléed meringue on top — part snow cone, part pie topping, part pure summertime magic. In this episode, he takes us behind the counter to show how this deceptively simple treat became a Smorgasburg obsession, one spoonful at a time.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: There are breakfast burritos, and then there’s Macheen’s breakfast burrito — a tortilla wrapped around the imagination of chef Jonathan Pérez and his sister, Ana. Birria and swiss, longanisa, and crispy pork belly breakfast burritos are the true stars at Macheen. In this episode, they show us how their spin on the classics has turned into one of Smorgasburg’s most talked-about stalls.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Dominic Cagliero didn’t set out to be a pitmaster. He was an Army vet who fell in love with barbecue the long, hard way: hours tending a fire, obsessing over smoke, figuring out how to make brisket bend without breaking. Full Send is the result — a Filipino-Texan fusion BBQ stall at Smorgasburg LA where the energy feels less like a business and more like a backyard party.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: At Lobsterdamus, family is everything. The Reyes family set out to change the way LA thinks about lobster — not boiled but split in half, grilled over mesquite, and dripping with butter. What started as a family vision has become one of Smorgasburg’s signature stalls, proving lobster doesn’t need fine dining to feel unforgettable.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Chef Yazeed “Yaz” Soudani’s Jordanian-style shawarma popped out of a backyard and turned Smorgasburg LA into his laboratory. Think juicy chicken marinated in spices from Amman, fresh saj bread, beef-tallow-fried fries, and a “Yaz way” that’s equal parts garlic kick + pomegranate molasses. Chef Yaz takes us through his journey to Smorgasburg and shares what's next.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Temozón is the birthplace of Yucatán's signature smoked meat Carne Ahumada and everyone in town claims to have a relative who invented it. Pati strolls around town to try different versions of Carne Ahumada. She also returns to Hacienda Tamchén for another traditional dish prepared by chef Julio Ku Dominguez called Huidzi Bii Wai, which means "united tortilla."

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients only found in Yucatán that make recados unique, touring citrus, habanero, and chaya fields at an hacienda. Then traditional cook Rosa makes a Relleno Negro using recado negro.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Today no trip to Yucatán is complete without seeing a beautiful cenote, natural freshwater pools in caves. But Mayans saw them as the gateway to the underworld. To learn more about Mayan communities, Pati visits Cenote Xocempich with activist and lawyer Zoila Cen, who has dedicated her career to helping Mayan people. The next day, Zoila invites Pati to her niece's birthday celebration.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: An ingredient Pati constantly uses is salt and Yucatán has one of the most unique salts. The Las Coloradas salt, which means blush red, gets its distinctive color from red algae. Engineer Felipe Perez takes Pati to the pink lakes where the salt is produced. Down the road in Rio Lagartos, conservationist Diego Nuñez takes her to see another pink wonder, Mexico's highest concentration of flamingos.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Yaxunah, Pati discovers Yucatán's "league of their own." She joins the Amazonas, a softball team of indigenous women, for their morning practice. As they built a name for themselves, they overcame the mindset that women belong in the kitchen. After teaching Pati the ins and outs of the game, Doña Enedina invites her over for Brazo de Reina, a tamal with hardboiled eggs and ground pepitas.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: In this "surf and turf" show, a marine biologist brings ocean-fresh sea urchins for Steven to grill. Local spiny lobster is split and roasted in the shell directly on the embers. Meanwhile, Alaskan king crab gets grilled and served with garlicky absinthe butter. Representing turf are bone-in veal chops blasted with rosemary smoke and beef plate ribs, spit-roasted on a wood-burning rotisserie.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Steven takes a field trip to the famed Hitching Post II in Buellton, California, where owner Frank Ostini demonstrates the ultimate Santa Maria barbecue. Back on the set, Santa Barbara fisherwoman Stephanie Munz shares her secret for grilled whelks (sea snails). The celebration continues as we meet some of the production crew and go behind the scenes of Project Smoke.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Victory will be yours! Start the party with chicken legs smoke-roasted over maple wood, then glazed with a fiery fusion of maple syrup and sriracha. A quartet of grilled and smoked beans appears in a colorful side dish. Next up, a trio of internationally-inspired burgers: inside-out American-style burgers; Greek-style spiced lamb burgers; and kaffir lime-scented Thai veal burgers.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Its bright but complex flavors and affinity for smoke and fire have fueled the obsession with Mexican food and drink north of the border. Tomatoes, onions, and chiles are roasted in the coals to make an unforgettable salsa. Quesadillas conceal a perfectly cooked egg. Then, a Grilled Nopalitos Corn Salad and chipotle-marinated pork tenderloin. To finish, pineapple slices flambéed with mezcal.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show highlights the conviviality of a South American cookout. The secrets to recreate the pollo served in Peruvian enclaves will be revealed in this episode. Little known in the U.S. is choripan, a kind of Andean hot dog. Finally, Brazilian churrasco is made of spit-roast picanha (top sirloin cap), chicken thighs, kielbasa, peppers, and onions—all served with a Brazilian country-style salsa.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Fresh local fish hits the grill in this show, which is devoted to the art of grilling seafood. Local Channel Island rockfish roasts on a Himalayan salt slab, served with Melon Mint Relish. Tuna steaks come spice-rubbed and grill-blackened, sauced with Cajun Remoulade. Next, fire-roasted shrimp with Deconstructed Pesto. And for smoked fish lovers, Alaskan king salmon smoked over maple wood.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom learn the secrets behind the perfect traditional English roast dinner in London’s historic Borough Market, explore the best of the diverse food offerings in Brick Lane and pop in to see their friend, Sir Ian McKellen, in his pub in East London.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom head to Dom’s hometown of Manchester, the world’s first industrialised city and now a vibrant food capital. They brunch at cult diner Gooey, learn to cook curry at a classic “Rice & Three” café, explore the science behind ice cream cones, and enjoy a special tour of Manchester United’s iconic stadium.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Cornwall Castle, Part 1: Mar gets a phone call from another time period. The new owners of an honest-to-goodness castle want to restore and renovate their new property using Mar's 6 Casual Luxury design principles as a guide. It could be a Margical makeover of this hidden-away treasure, but there is a lot of work to do. Mar meets the enthusiastic family and learns their era-honoring plans.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Cornwall Castle, Part 2: Mar lets down the drawbridge to show you the big reveal! Mar heads back to the castle to check the progress, and for the grand tour of the final results. His 6 Casual Luxury design principles were the owners' guide, and they definitely work in every time period! Watch this distressed property find it's "happily ever after"! (It's a Wow!)

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating 40! 40 original episodes, that is. So Mar’s looking back at three full seasons of Casual Luxury designs. Our favorite moments and yours. Join Mar and the Team on this very special episode as we look back at many of the places, characters, fun, makeovers and trips that make the series special—plus a rare look at the very beginning and some new reveals, too. Celebrate with us!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If your kitchen is looking a little dingy and dated, you’ve come to the right place! We’re taking a look at the 10 best remodeling upgrades for your kitchen, from countertops and cabinets to flooring and lighting.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We explore how to modify new and existing homes so that they continue to function for homeowners as they grow older, including remodeling a bathroom for wheelchair access, lowering door thresholds, and building wheelchair ramps.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In this episode we’re following a project that adds a pool to a small space in the backyard of a home to turn it into a wonderful outdoor entertainment area. Plus, we take a look at other options that are available in pools.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny travels to Chicago to find the latest and greatest in kitchen and bath products, designs, and ideas at the annual Kitchen and Bath Industry Show (KBIS), from tubs and faucets to cabinets and countertops, to keep your home ahead of the curve.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If you’re thinking about making a major improvement to your home, it only makes sense to choose one that will provide a high return on your investment. Watch this episode to find out which home improvement projects add the most value to your home.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Watch this episode to see how we matched the brick and trim when we built an addition—which includes a family room, dining room, and bonus room—from the ground up on the existing home of a young family in need of more living space.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In this episode we’ll show you how to make five great interior improvements to your home, including installing prefinished hardwood flooring, adding recessed light fixtures, and tips on what to look for in a central air conditioner.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In this episode we convert an existing underused carport into a 13’x15′ playroom for the family’s three children. Plus, there’s enough room leftover for two storage rooms and a outdoor kitchen with grilling station for Mom and Dad.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: While asphalt driveways are durable, they do require some periodic maintenance. In this episode, Danny demonstrates how to properly patch, seal, protect, and maintain an asphalt driveway. Plus, we take a look at other driveway options.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This kitchen was over thirty years old and had started to show its age. Without making any structural changes, we’re updating an outdated galley-style kitchen to be more modern and efficient while reusing the existing appliances to stay in budget.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: These homeowners are adding a large pressure treated wood deck, complete with a covered outdoor cooking area and storage underneath, so they can further enjoy outdoor living. We’re also adding handrails, steps, and built-in seating.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Whether you have an inefficient clothes dryer or are tired of waiting for hot water, we’ve got the answer. Watch this episode to find the solution to common home problems, including DIY recycling chutes and dumbwaiters.

programme.title: Ottolenghi's Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: Yotam begins his Mediterranean journey in the vibrant city of Marrakesh, inspiring his inner chef to create. He then travels to the luminous Atlas Mountains to dine with the Berbers before venturing onward to the coastal town of Essaouria.

programme.title: Ottolenghi's Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: Turkish cuisine channels cultural currents from all compass points, and Istanbul is the perfect city to experience this cornucopia of unique culinary dishes. Ottolenghi also dines at Asitane Restaurant, visits the Grand Bazaar, and more.

programme.title: Mediterranean Chronicles
programme.desc: About 150 years ago, Mount Ventoux's forests had almost entirely been destroyed by human activity. Rebuilt at the end of the 19th century, the forest now contains a variety of plants, birds, insects, and mammal species, including the wolf.

programme.title: Mediterranean Chronicles
programme.desc: Born of the sea, the sun, and the wind, salt has been used by man since prehistoric times. In the Camargue region in the South of France, salt workers patiently assist the work of nature in the movement of the waters and the winds.

programme.title: Around the World with Marlin Darrah

programme.title: Around the World with Marlin Darrah

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: Venture along the Yellow Roads of Italy. We begin with a private performance at the Posta de Donini Hotel, followed by a visit to the city of Perugia. Also, dine in the lush vineyards of Lungarotti, and get a private tour of the Vatican.

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: Join Music Voyager in Florence and experience this famous city by both day and night, including a visit to the Ferragamo Museum. We will also tour the city of Lucca, the magnificent Cinque Terre, as well as the historic city of Siena.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Cyprus is an ancient island full of mythology and festive dancing. Mickela discovers the rich tapestry of Greek culture here by taking part in belly dancing, meeting silversmiths and lace artisans, and celebrating the Kataklysmos Festival.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi

programme.title: Music Voyager

programme.title: Music Voyager

programme.desc: Micah Torrance, formerly a famous marshal, who is now a drunk crippled from a gunfight, stumbles into North Fork. Lucas McCain hires him in hopes of rehabilitating the man. The good deed quickly backfires when outlaws arrive.

programme.title: An Eye for an Eye

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: The Oklahoman
programme.desc: While moving his family out West, Dr. John Brighton (Joel McCrea) loses his wife in childbirth. After her death, John sets up his home in Indian territory. By the time his daughter is 7 years old, two women are competing for the doctor's affections: Ann (Barbara Hale), a rancher's widow, and Maria (Gloria Talbott), a young Native American maiden who watches over the doctor's daughter. When the town bully, Mel (Douglas Dick), wants to take the land of Maria's father, the doctor gets involved.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder
programme.desc: Four ne'er-do-well sons reunite in their Texas hometown to attend their mother's funeral. Led by older brothers John (John Wayne), a gunfighter, and Tom (Dean Martin), a gambler, the four soon learn that their father gambled away the family ranch, which was the cause of his murder. The brothers decide to avenge their father's death and win back the ranch, a situation that quickly leads to trouble with the local sheriff and violent conflict with the rival Hastings clan.

programme.title: Big Jake

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George returns to “Tornado Alley” with 3 fellow stormchasers to see what the 2007 Storm Season will bring.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George experiences the most extreme climates in North America. First he visits the hottest place on the continent – Death Valley, then the coldest – Snag, Yukon.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Geoorge explores Java at the heart of the Ring of Fire.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: “Angry Planet” is there as 3 storms make landfall as hurricanes in the US.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Mother Nature is back and ready to blow you away, with some of the fiercest, most electrifying, and most extreme weather we have ever seen! So buckle in and let’s get ready to ride!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Mother Nature is back and ready to show you just how powerful she can be!

programme.title: Sinister Storms
programme.desc: Journey through nature's extremes - from the tranquil beauty of Snowcover and Rainbows to the raw power of Tidal Waves and Dust Devils.

programme.title: Sinister Storms
programme.desc: Here are some encounters that demonstrate that we are at the mercy of nature here on Earth.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Stormhunters Mark and Jaclyn visit Canada's Arctic to see how the inhabitants live. Jaclyn also hopes to achieve one of her lifelong goals; to come face to face with a polar bear. Will she be able to cross this off her bucket list?

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: Young monkeys, otters and coatis take their first steps in a spectacular, perilous world.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: Monkey, otter and coati families are put to the test by Brazil's monsoon rains and floods.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: Fierce drought tests the monkey, otter and coati families as they turn to courtship.

programme.title: Wild Mexico
programme.desc: Travel to the mountainous Serranias del Burro, a vital outpost for Mexico's black bears.

programme.title: Wild Mexico

programme.title: Wild Mexico
programme.desc: Northern Mexico is the country's driest region, dominated by two great deserts.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: Japan's 'big island' is home to millions of people and an astonishing range of wildlife.

programme.desc: Veterans of the sea and newly sunken ships host incredible marine ecosystems.

programme.title: Reef Wrecks
programme.desc: From navy vessels to pirate ships, the Yucatan Peninsula hosts many wrecks.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: See how fire and ice collide to create the most geologically powerful island.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Check on the cubs’ survival skills and attend a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Cheer as six happy, healthy bears embark on their new life in the wild.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall

programme.title: The Quick and The Slow
